content:
# Gas Chromatography

**Summary**: A technique used to separate and identify components in a mixture of gases or liquids.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-al-eid|Al-Eid, 2023]] used gas-chromatography to analyze hydrocarbon components and determine the extent of loss.

- [[2024-almutawa|AlMutawa, 2024]] used gas chromatography (GC) for the analysis of hydrocarbon components within the soil samples.

- [[2025-almousa|Almousa, 2025]] used gas-chromatography to quantify MTBE and Toluene concentrations in the aqueous phase.

## Instruments and Software



- [[2024-almutawa|AlMutawa, 2024]] used gas chromatography (GC) for the analysis of hydrocarbon components within the soil samples.

- [[2025-almousa|Almousa, 2025]] used gas-chromatography to quantify MTBE and Toluene concentrations in the aqueous phase.

## Key Results and Findings

- Identified that most C3-C7 hydrocarbons were absent after just one week of storage in a capped vial. ([[2023-al-eid|Al-Eid, 2023, p. 104]])
